column1: # Format:  subject > axis > term1, term2, ... : docRef1, docRef2, ...
#   - A rule fires when ALL trigger terms appear in the prompt (case-insensitive substring).
#   - Express alternatives as SEPARATE lines (same refs, a different trigger).
#   - docRef is a document id (shown in search results) or a fragment of its path.
#   - '#' starts a comment; blank lines are ignored.
